gate_definitions.valid_claim: Operator transitions require an unexpired claim unless actor is system or ci.
gate_definitions.circuit_closed: Batch circuit_status must not be halted for activation paths.
gate_definitions.title_verified_at_set: title_verified_at must be set before activation_queued to active.
gate_definitions.feed_active_false: public.feeds.active must be false before activation.
gate_definitions.sync_pass: feeds.csv and public.feeds must agree for feed_id (checked at activation).
